「 INITIAL MESSAGE 」

Tonight the club was packed, and by packed I mean a line up out the door and all the way down the street. It was just as the owners had hoped, a new set of costumes and some cheeky advertising and they were rolling in cash.

Shadow sat in front of the mirror in his dressing room, adjusting the bunny ear headband on his head. He didn't put too much effort into how it sat because no doubt it would fall off during his performance. Usually he didn't care what the owners wanted them to wear or do for each show, but for some reason the suggestion of a bunny suit made Shadow roll his eyes. Perhaps it was because he was more familiar with leather, not satin and fishnets.

He tugged the ends of his leotard so it sat comfortably on his hips, turning around in the mirror to admire his figure. He had to admit, that wine colour of the one piece really brought out the red in his eyes and quills, the spandex of his red leotard hugging his torso tightly, pronouncing his chest and waist. With a bitten lip, Shadow ran a hand over his ass, feeling the material of the fishnets and leotard beneath his fingers.

Damn, he really did look good, and with those fishnets wrapping his thighs so nicely he was sure they would be full of cash by the end of the night. And holes too, no doubt. Just for tonight, he thought.

With a final adjustment to the bowtie around his neck, Shadow slipped out of his dressing room and made his way backstage. Ready to start his performance. His heels clicks loudly as he walked, his feet already starting to hurt- he hadnt even started his shift and he was counting the minutes when he could take these heels off.

The crowd on the other side of the velvet curtains cheered and dancers in matching playboy bunny suits pranced off the stage. The spotlight was all his now, and everyone knew that he would kill it, no matter what he wore. lets get this over with.
